description: Address critical issues from production-readiness review: add reply.sent guard to auth hook, delete empty CampaignDetailPage
steps: Step 1 - Add 'if (reply.sent) return;' after the requireAuth() call in the global onRequest hook in packages/server-core/src/app.ts to prevent request passthrough if auth plugin behavior changes.
Step 2 - Delete apps/quantads/src/pages/campaign/[id].tsx which renders null and conflicts with app/ directory routing.
acceptance_criteria: packages/server-core/src/app.ts auth hook includes reply.sent guard after requireAuth() call
pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/server-core passes with all 18 tests green
verification: pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/server-core exits 0 with 18 passing tests
findings: Both changes were straightforward. The reply.sent guard is a single-line addition. The campaign page deletion removes the entire campaign/ directory under pages/ since it was the only file. All tests pass without modification - the existing test suite already covers the auth hook behavior.
